evals.prompt: can you review OpportunityTriggerHandler.cls before I merge? it's in force-app/main/default/classes. my tech lead keeps complaining about our trigger patterns and I want this one to be clean
evals.expected_output: Structured review that also reads the trigger, test class, and -meta.xml; findings grouped CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW with a summary table and a Deploy Safe verdict

evals.prompt: we had a prod incident last night — the nightly batch job double-credited a bunch of member accounts when someone re-ran it manually. here's the batch class, can you check if it's safe to re-run and what else might be wrong with it
evals.expected_output: Identifies missing batch idempotency guard as the root issue, checks finish() visibility, Database.insert error handling, and Database.Stateful usage; concrete fix code

evals.prompt: is this safe to deploy? MyAuraController.cls has a few @AuraEnabled methods the new LWC calls
evals.expected_output: Checks CRUD/FLS (WITH USER_MODE / SECURITY_ENFORCED), unbounded queries, input validation on parameters, AuraHandledException wrapping; explicit YES/NO deploy verdict
